steps.direction: Match vid-example.mov: after the one-second brand card, hold the hero while the vehicle animation plays.
Match vid-example.mov: one steady homepage pass from hero through services/testimonials/footer in about six seconds.
steps.why: One continuous scroll through the entire site at a steady pace

steps.direction: Keep the transition to the booking page direct and unchanged.
steps.why: Click the red Book Now button in the header

steps.direction: Match vid-example.mov: hold the booking form as the final destination for roughly four to five seconds.
steps.why: Booking page loads — fit the booking form and rest the cursor on its right corner
